purpose: Search existing artifacts for a bridge from 120-record station identifiers to channel-aware (slot, local) addresses.
boundary: This searches for a 120-record to channel-address bridge.
This does not claim a G60-native NRC generator.
This does not close Gap A.
This does not prove full G900.
If no bridge is found, the next step is to inspect station provenance fields and construct the bridge explicitly.
